headline.purpose: Section headers, sheet/dialog titles, AppHeader titles.

body.purpose: Secondary descriptive text; always textSecondary, never primary ink.

label.purpose: AppChip and AppSectionLabel uppercase small-caps text only.

shadows.name: glow
shadows.purpose: Diffuse accent-tinted halo under genuinely elevated cards (AppTheme.softShadow).

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Neutral contact shadow paired with glow to ground the lift.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default state-change easing; restrained, no bounce/elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-pill primary action button, Trust Blue fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0672EF; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 16px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0559C2; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0672EF; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #0559C2; transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Full-pill outline button, transparent fill, Trust Blue text.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #0672EF; padding: 16px 24px; border: 1px solid #B9C9EA; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #0672EF; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0672EF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Squared, bold uppercase small-caps status badge (e.g. MET).
components.css: .ds-chip-status { display: inline-block; background: #3AAE7A; color: #F5F9FF; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.8px; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Neutral filled tag chip for categories (e.g. AI & ROBOTICS).
components.css: .ds-chip-tag { display: inline-block; background: #D0E4FF; color: #7E8FAC; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.8px; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Flat-by-default card with hairline border, used for list items and content panels.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #F5F9FF; border: 1px solid rgba(212,224,247,0.9); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card strong { color: #18253B; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card p { color: #50627F; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Elevated Card
components.description: Card with directional gradient fill and signature accent-tinted glow shadow, reserved for genuinely lifted surfaces.
components.html:
Follow-up due

Send recap email to Jordan Smith
components.css: .ds-card-elevated { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F5F9FF, #E0EEFF); border: 1px solid rgba(212,224,247,0.9); border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(11,109,239,0.18), 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-elevated strong { color: #18253B; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card-elevated p { color: #50627F; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Filled text field with hairline border and Trust Blue focus stroke.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #E0EEFF; border: 1px solid #D4E0F7; border-radius: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #18253B; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7E8FAC; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #0672EF; border-width: 1.6px; }

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Rounded-square gradient avatar with initials, the system's signature contact representation.
components.css: .ds-avatar { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(6,114,239,0.22), rgba(5,89,194,0.10)); border: 1px solid rgba(6,114,239,0.25); color: #0672EF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; }

narrative.overview: Exono is built for two tempos of the same job: the frantic capture of a name and a face mid-conversation on a loud expo floor, and the calmer, considered review of that relationship weeks later. The Glass Cockpit metaphor holds both — an instrument panel a professional trusts under pressure, where every readout is legible at a glance and nothing is decorative. The cool, saturated blue that anchors the palette isn't a brand flourish; it's the signal color of a tool that works, the way an avionics display uses one disciplined hue for everything that matters. This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS dashboard cliches (gradient-text metrics, identical icon-card grids, stacked eyebrow labels), Salesforce-style enterprise CRM clutter, and consumer social-app glossiness (heavy gradients, glassmorphism, bouncy motion). Exono is a field instrument, not a back office and not a feed.
keyCharacteristics: One disciplined accent (Trust Blue) carries nearly all color signal; everything else is cool-tinted neutral.
Flat by default — depth is reserved for surfaces that are genuinely elevated (active cards, sheets), not applied uniformly.
Pill-shaped, high-confidence buttons; small-caps, bold-weight chip labels — tactile, not timid.
Rounded-square avatars (not circles) — a deliberate, slightly technical departure from generic CRM/social conventions.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Trust Blue is the only saturated color permitted. Status colors (success, destructive) are functional exceptions, never decorative ones — they appear only to confirm a state change or a destructive action, never as page chrome.

rules.name: The Calibration Rule
rules.body: Every text role maps to an exact context.theme.typography step (xs / sm / lg / xl / xl2). Never hardcode fontSize — an uncalibrated size breaks the instrument-panel discipline the same way a mismatched gauge would.

rules.name: The Flat-Unless-Lifted Rule
rules.body: A surface earns a shadow only when it represents something genuinely raised above the panel (a featured card, a modal sheet). Default list rows, inputs, and section containers stay flat with a hairline border — shadows on every card is the Salesforce-clutter failure mode this system rejects.

dos: Do keep Trust Blue (#0672EF / #2B8BFF) as the only saturated color in any screen — it should read as rare and deliberate, the signal among neutrals.
Do default to flat surfaces with a hairline border; reserve the Glow+Ambient shadow pair for genuinely elevated cards only.
Do use rounded-square AppAvatar for every contact representation — never a circle.
Do keep buttons full-pill (999px) and chips squared (4px) — the shape contrast is intentional: pills act, chips label.
Do route every text size through context.theme.typography steps; never hardcode fontSize.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated accent color or a gradient-text treatment — emphasis comes from weight/size, never from color-gradient fills on type.
Don't add shadows to every card uniformly — that is the Salesforce-style enterprise clutter this system explicitly rejects.
Don't use glassmorphism, heavy gradients, or bouncy/elastic motion anywhere — Exono is not a consumer social app.
Don't stack icon+heading+text cards into identical repeating grids — the generic SaaS dashboard cliche PRODUCT.md calls out by name.
Don't use a side-stripe colored border (border-left/border-right as an accent) on cards, list items, or alerts — use the hairline border + background tint pattern instead.
Don't render contact avatars as circles or hand-rolled containers — always AppAvatar.
